title: 分离安装 smoke 的本地与 PR 基线

sources.reason: The smoke workflow must separate local no-diff checks from the full PR diff audit.
check-ai and check-ai-pr consume different baseline semantics.

riskAssessment.reason: Initial skeleton; replace with task-specific implementation and review risks.

executionDecision.reason: Remote evidence distinguishes local HEAD validation from the explicit PR base audit.

preReviewWarnings: Replace with task-specific review focus, or clear when no special review focus remains.

checkpointPolicy.reason: Record at least one checkpoint before finishing to reduce mid-task drift.

acceptance: The temporary repository local check-ai invocation uses HEAD as its no-diff baseline.
The check-ai-pr invocation continues to use the temporary repository's initial commit.
The complete local quality and governance gates pass.
guidelines: Keep local and PR baseline semantics explicit in CI commands.
Do not weaken or remove the installed template's PR ownership gate.
Keep the change limited to smoke-test baseline selection.

intent.problem: Passing the temporary repository's initial commit to local check-ai makes coverage guard inspect the whole installed template as a current change; local checks need HEAD while PR audit needs the initial commit.
constraints: Keep check-ai-pr against the pre-install commit.
intent.rationale: Explicitly separating the two baselines validates each gate against the repository state it is designed to inspect.

evidence: The smoke command uses AI_BASE_COMMIT=HEAD to produce an empty local diff.
The smoke command keeps check-ai-pr AI_BASE_COMMIT="$base".

restrictedWriteApproval.reason: User explicitly authorized continued remediation of remote CI blockers.

rollbackNote: Revert this Work Item diff and restore related tests and docs.
